cards.back: A model describing the degradation and restoration of images
An image restoration algorithm that captures the fine details of an image
A mathematical filter used to restore degraded images by reducing noise
The formula used in the Wiener Filter: W(x,y) = (A + L(x,y))^(-1) (B(x,y) + L(x,y))
A mathematical filter that represents the ideal filter, which is a rectangular function
